title: [CODEREVIEW-6 pass 3] Missing vendor in board.yml and no variant yaml files
description: lichen/boards/elecrow/thinknode_m7/board.yml:2 - lacks vendor: elecrow line present in other boards. No *procpu.yaml and *appcpu.yaml files like in heltec and t_deck boards for full registration with twister/west. This may explain why west boards does not list it. P2 registration issue.
